prestazioni: Engine: 3.0L Type 930/02 flat-six (911/77-81) with forged Mahle pistons (96.5mm bore, 70.4mm stroke), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a custom 9.8:1 compression ratio for high-octane (100+ RON) fuel compatibility. Pair with a Schrick 284° camshaft (intake/exhaust) for optimized airflow in the 4,000–7,500 RPM range.

Forced Induction: Single-turbo setup using a Garrett GT35R (82mm compressor, .82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold (TIG-welded, equal-length runners) and a GReddy Type-S blow-off valve. Boost controlled via a HKS EVC-S electronic boost controller (targeting 1.2 bar / 17.4 psi) with a custom intercooler (Spearco 6000-series core, 22x6x3.5 inches) and silicone couplers from Vibrant Performance.

Fuel & Ignition: Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump (300+ LPH) feeding dual 750cc/min Bosch Motorsport injectors (PN 0 280 158 109) with a Motec M800 ECU (standalone, sequential injection). Ignition upgraded to a MSD Digital 6AL-2 with a Blaster SS coil and NGK R7437-9 racing plugs (0.6mm gap). Oil cooling via a Setrab 50-row oil cooler (Series 1, 19-row core) with AN-10 lines and a Mocal thermostatic sandwich plate.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) 911 SC kit (Pandem-style, 50mm flares front/rear) with custom front splitter (964-style, 3-piece carbon) and a ducktail spoiler (930 Turbo replica, carbon fiber). Paint: Porsche Iris Blue (911 SC original) with matte black accents (hood, flares, rear valence) and a custom gold pinstripe (1/8-inch, hand-painted).

Wheels: BBS RS 010 (16x9 ET20 front, 16x11 ET15 rear) with custom gold centers, polished lips, and hub-centric adapters (5x130 to 5x120, 15mm spacer). Tires: Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 (225/50/16 front, 285/40/16 rear) with TPMS sensors (Vredestein). Fender vents: Custom 3D-printed ABS (935-style, functional for brake cooling) with mesh inserts (stainless steel, 1.5mm gauge).

Interior: Full Recaro SRD (911-specific, FIA-approved) with Schroth 6-point harnesses (ASM, 3-inch shoulder straps). Steering wheel: Nardi Classic (380mm, perforated leather) with a quick-release hub (NRG Innovations). Gauges: Stack ST8000 (8,000 RPM redline, oil temp/pressure, boost) mounted in a custom aluminum dash panel (CNC-machined, brushed finish). Roll cage: Custom 8-point bolt-in (Autopower, 1.75-inch DOM tubing, TIG-welded) with harness bar and door bars.
